virality_data.topic: Fixing Warp Terminal Errors with a Custom Automation Script
virality_data.virality_reasoning: This topic will go viral because it addresses a specific pain point for developers using Warp, a trending GitHub repository, and provides a actionable solution with a custom automation script. The fact that it's a first-person account of fixing a frustrating error will resonate with readers and encourage sharing.
